release_notes: Fixes the auto-updater so it actually delivers the whimsy feature. v1.0.41–v1.0.46 added ready_animations.py and ready_animation_picker.py to the repo, but those filenames were never added to UPDATE_ALLOWED_FILES or to version.json's files map, so the auto-updater silently skipped them on every check. Direct-installer users were upgrading chairside_ready_alert.py to code that did 'import ready_animations' against a missing module — the try/except around the import caught the failure and left the trigger permanently disabled with no error log entry. v1.0.47 adds both filenames to the whitelist and the file manifest; on the next launch after upgrade the updater will fetch ready_animations.py and ready_animation_picker.py and write them next to chairside_ready_alert.py in the user-data directory. After that the in-app trigger comes alive — TEST_MODE is still on so every Ready click fires a random animation from the default-enabled set.
